long_description:
NRE were alerted of link flaps between ngas01.sr01.par05 Et6/21/1 <-> ngcs017.2.sr01.par05 Et14/1. Raising this INC to track progress.


https://github.ibm.com/IaaS-NRE/nreincidents/issues/19699
short_description: ngas01.sr01.par05 Et6/21/1 <-> ngcs017.2.sr01.par05 Et14/1 | Link Flap
close_notes: Link shut to mitigate any further impact. Will proceed to do Layer1 troubleshooting to resolve any issues with the link before adding it back to service. (Note: This incident was resolved via one-touch automation.)
